site.title: Order - Gothenburg University Library
site.description: Order and queue materials from Gothenburg University Library.

closed.title: The ordering service is temporarily closed
closed.description: We apologize for the inconvenience, but our ordering service is currently unavailable. We are working to resolve the issue as quickly as possible. Please try again later or Contact the library for assistance.

guAuth.title: Sign in with your GU account
guAuth.description: For students and employees at GU with a gus account or x account.

githubAuth.title: Sign in with GitHub
githubAuth.description: To order materials you need to sign in with your GitHub account.

kohaAuth.title: Sign in with library account
kohaAuth.description: For users who do not have a GU account.
kohaAuth.invalidCredentials: Invalid login credentials. Please try again.

orderDenied.title: Cannot place order
orderDenied.description: Something went wrong. Contact the library for assistance.
orderDenied.descriptionWithMissingId: Search for something to order on the library's website.
orderDenied.descriptionWithUserRestrictionsOnCurrent: Restrictions on the material for this user

errors.ITEM_NOT_FOUND: Could not find the material you are trying to order.
errors.FORBIDDEN: This material may not be borrowed.
errors.ALREADY_BORROWED: You have already borrowed this material.
errors.ALREADY_RESERVED: You are already ordered or queuing for this material.

labels.location: Where do you want to pick up?
labels.loanType: How do you want to borrow?
labels.reserveNotes: Any other information about the order
labels.publicNote: You can order copies from the following holdings:

placeholders.reserveNotes: For example: volume, issue, year of publication
placeholders.subscriptionNotes: Enter volume, year, issue or page number for the copy you want to order.

messages.privacyWarning: The information in this field will be printed. Do not write personal information here. Contact the library if you have questions about your order.

message.errorLoadingData: Could not load all necessary data to display order details. Please try again later or contact the library.
message.noAvailableItems: No copies are available right now.
message.noNotAvailableItems: No copies are currently on loan.
message.infoAboutAvailableItems: There are available copies that you can order
message.hasAvaillableCourseBook: There are available copies that you can pick up yourself from the shelf
message.unsupportedViewType: This type of material ({viewType}) does not support displaying order details. Contact the library.

userWarning.message: You can order this material, but you will not be able to borrow it because you have overdue fees or overdue loans.
userWarning.action: Sign in to My loans to see what you need to do.

statusLimitation.READING_ROOM_ONLY: Reading room loan, not for home loan

biblio.title: Your order
biblio.errorLoadingData: Could not load all necessary data to display order details. Please try again later or contact the library.

confirmation.youHavePlaceInQueue: You have position {positionInQueue} in the queue for this material.
confirmation.messagePickup: You will receive a message when the material is ready for pickup at {pickupLocation}.
confirmation.messageNoPickup: You will receive a message when the material is sent from the library.
confirmation.pickupInfoCode: In the message (which will arrive via email and/or SMS) there is a pickup code that you need to find the material on the library's shelf for ordered books.
confirmation.myLoansLink: You can view your loans and orders in My loans.
